name: commission-system-vercel-proxy-only
description: Vercel frontend and API proxy for the commission system with production-current release stamps aligned.

scripts.check:api: node --check api/_gasProxyCommon.js && node --check api/gas.js && node --check api/login.js && node --check api/public-config.js
scripts.audit:strict: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && npm run check:api && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseG_security_gate.py --strict && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict
scripts.build:strict: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && npm run check:api && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseG_security_gate.py --strict && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict
